pricing.refundPolicy: No refunds. EOD resets $99, Static resets $349. Instant Funding has no reset option.

payouts.schedule: Fixed windows (5th–8th and 20th–23rd each month). EOD/Static: 14-day cycles, Instant: 10-day cycles.

rules.consistencyRule: EOD/Static: 50% eval, 30% funded. Instant: 20% of total profit per day.
rules.notes: Three models: EOD Evaluation (trailing EOD drawdown, monthly subscription $99–$249, scaling during eval, 2.5% daily loss limit once funded only, max drawdown 3.67%–5%), Static Evaluation (fixed/static drawdown, monthly subscription $199–$349, no daily loss limit, max drawdown 3.33%–4.17%), and Instant Funding (trailing real-time drawdown, one-time fee $349–$699, 3% daily loss cap, 5% max drawdown, requires 7% profit target and at least 10 trading days with minimum 6 trades before first payout). Copy trading allowed between own accounts only — not allowed between different traders or via signal services. Algorithmic trading / EAs not clearly confirmed by the firm. No resets for Instant Funding; EOD resets $99, Static resets $349. Fixed payout windows: 5th–8th and 20th–23rd of each month. Min withdrawal $500 (EOD/Static), $250 (Instant). Max withdrawal $3K–$5K per cycle depending on account size. Traders keep 100% of the first $10K in profit; after that, profit split starts at 90% and scales to 92%–95% at GOAT Trader level. Consistency rules vary: EOD/Static use 50% during evaluation and 30% when funded; Instant limits profit concentration to 20% per day. Contract limits depend on account tier and scaling — funded accounts can scale toward up to approximately 9 mini contracts depending on performance and stage. KYC required before first withdrawal.

markets.instruments: Futures (55 CME instruments: Equity Indices, Metals, Energy, Currency Futures, Agricultural & Soft Commodities)

notableFlags: Futures arm of Goat Funded Trader
